_description: Dark editorial 16:9 slide. Heading is always bright white. Body and label use the accent color. Image sits beside text (right or left). Only two colors per slide: 'bg' and 'accent'.

_slots.heading: REQUIRED — main heading. 1–6 words. Always bright warm white.
_slots.body: optional — supporting paragraph beside/below heading. 1–3 sentences in accent color.
_slots.label: optional — short uppercase eyebrow tag (e.g. 'Chapter 01') in accent color.
_slots.image: optional — file path relative to data JSON or https:// URL. Shown beside text. Never cropped.
_slots.image-position: optional — 'right' (default, text left + image right) or 'left' (image left + text right).
_slots.accent: optional — color for label, rule, and body text. Default: #c8b89a.
_slots.footer: optional — small muted text at bottom-left.

title: Design Principles

slides.label: Chapter 01
slides.heading: Less is more
slides.body: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. Remove everything that does not serve the message.

slides.label: Chapter 02
slides.heading: White space breathes
slides.body: Empty space is not wasted space. It gives the eye room to rest.

slides.label: Chapter 04
slides.heading: Image speaks first
slides.body: A single photograph can anchor an entire narrative.

slides.label: Variation
slides.heading: Lead with the visual
slides.body: When the image is the story, let it arrive first.
